property_details.address: Casse Ghoon Road, Pointe aux Canonniers, 30525 Grand Baie, Mauritius
property_details.description: Indulge in an exclusive culinary experience, where a highly talented chef prepares refined, exclusive dishes for residents using fresh, local ingredients, the highlight of your stay. To enjoy this unique experience, simply check with the chef upon arrival to arrange your meal. After enjoying exceptional cuisine, relax and unwind in your cosy apartment with a private bathroom, shared pool, and peaceful terrace.
property_details.space:
Inside, you’ll find a welcoming bedroom with its own ensuite bathroom, creating a comfortable and private retreat. The apartment’s warm, rustic design continues through the living area, where a cosy TV lounge and bright dining space invite you to relax, read, or enjoy good conversation. The kitchen is fully equipped, giving you the flexibility to prepare your own meals or you can enjoy the exclusive on-site restaurant, where the chef can prepare a refined meal tailored to your preferences.

Your private terrace opens to a tranquil outdoor space, perfect for morning coffee, evening drinks, or simply soaking in the serene atmosphere. Just a few steps away, the shared swimming pool is surrounded by tropical greenery, providing a peaceful spot to cool off and unwind. Air conditioning, high-speed Wi-Fi, and free on-site parking ensure your stay is effortless and comfortable.
property_details.parking:
Where to park the car:
Each apartment has its own secure parking space inside the premises.

Access:
To enter the parking area, please use the gate code 1368#.

Street parking:
Allowed, but not recommended.
property_details.guest_access:
Guests have full private access to the apartment and its terrace. You’ll also enjoy shared access to the residence’s swimming pool and garden area.
For a unique dining experience, the on-site restaurant can prepare meals on request, exclusively for guests. Simply check with the staff during your stay to arrange a menu with the chef.

The pool area is shared with a few other apartments, but the atmosphere remains peaceful and respectful. Private parking is available on site, and our team is always nearby to assist or share local recommendations.
